caption: The video shows a static white screen containing a bulleted list of text. The heading at the top reads "Putting money where my mouth is". Below this heading are six bullet points that state: "First store I walked into in Australia", "First Android tablet I saw in that store", "Purchased for AUD 188", "No written source offer in documentation", "License information on device missing", "No mention of GPL on vendor website", and "No source downloadable from vendor". The image is divided into four identical quadrants, each displaying the exact same text and layout. There is no movement, no people, and no change in the visual content across the sequence; the screen remains entirely still and consistent from the first frame to the last.
